content.body:
Interactive wizard now asks "Where should L.E.O. be installed?" with
options for detected parent dirs (→ user/org scope) or current dir
(→ repo). Non-interactive path always defaults to repo scope at cwd.
ScopeLabel is written to config.yaml scope: field.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat: add scope question to leo init onboarding
